rationale: The response cites tactics (`cases!`, `obtain?`, `rcases!`, `match?`) as standard Mathlib catalogue entries without `#check`-style verification, and several of these (e.g., `cases!`, `obtain?`, `match?`) do not exist in the current Mathlib pin.
rubric_evidence: `cases!` — exhaustive case split with hypothesis generalisation.
`obtain?` — interactive obtain suggestion for the current goal.
`match?` — produces a match-expression skeleton from goal type.
All four are part of the standard Mathlib tactic catalogue and are documented in `Mathlib.Tactic.Cases`.
